case_title: CINDY CHIN VS. JOSE LEOPOLDO PEREZ ALVAREZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIN, CINDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, JOSE LEOPOLDO PEREZ SEE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-05-2023 BY MARY E. WISS. PLAINTIFF CINDY CHIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE LEOPOLDO PEREZ ALVAREZ IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS VICTORIA AREVALO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE MARY E. WISS; CLERK: R. GUMPAL / R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED (D305)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2023 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$80.00);[PROOF DOCUMENT STAMPED:"BY FAX"] SERVED MAR-23-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, JOSE LEOPOLDO PEREZ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,273.50 FILED BY CHIN, CINDY AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, JOSE LEOPOLDO PEREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-05-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 305. DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIUPLATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM
